policy.default_action: Keep commands usable, but route touched public leaves through canonical bundles or record explicit exceptions.
policy.public_surface_rule: No new public governance surface may exist without topology and consolidation metadata.
policy.purpose: Execute public Justfile and leaf-surface reduction without deleting live operator surfaces prematurely.
